title: pyrus reflexipetala
intro: Pyrus reflexipetala, also known as the Chinese Pear, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus reflexipetala include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Pyrus reflexipetala include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
